T10.pattern_interpretation:
January 2026 energy-field review for T10 Air Chiller. Power factor averaged 0.890 (meter-measured).

Total consumption was 492,160 kWh with modeled electrical waste of 68,578 kWh (~12.2% of delivered energy).

Average apparent power was 754 kVA (25.1% of capacity), and peak demand reached 1,577 kVA (52.6% of capacity) on the 3,000 kVA transformer.

Reactive power demand peaked at 760.2 kVAR (avg 361.2 kVAR/hr), indicating meaningful power-factor correction opportunity.

Unity value potential (energy + cooling + CO2e) is approximately $494,180/year for this field.
